series_metadata.series_description: Recipient appeals of state hearing decisions requested by the counties. Includes decision summaries, rulings, correspondence and legal research pertaining to the appeal.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain for 4 years, then erase. ; Paper: Retain in office 90 days after prepped, imaged, indexed, and quality control of has been completed, then destroy., Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Shred
